title: Stockholm Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stockholm with a Z-Score of -3.20. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stockholm are extremely cold, with a Z-Score of -3.20 indicating a significant deviation from the average temperature. 
 The heating degree days (HDD) are at 12.2 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, highlighting the need for increased heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 48% and the wind speed is at 3.6 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to frost
